title: Procedure Has a Body
prompt: Identify where procedure is stored: chamber, channel, valve, float, pressure, or timing.

title: Thresholds Create Action
prompt: Find the level, pressure, or position that triggers the next state.

title: Hidden State Controls Output
prompt: Trace the concealed internal condition behind the visible effect.

title: Avoid Robot-Origin Myth
prompt: Use mechanical procedure and automaton language rather than projecting modern robotics backward.
